name: Lifecycle CRUD Stress Test

steps.name: CreateTrip
steps.details: Created trip 374be34e with title 'Lifecycle Test -- Kyoto Spring', status=TRIP_STATUS_PLANNING

steps.name: GetTrip (verify creation)
steps.details: Title, description, status=TRIP_STATUS_PLANNING all correct. Themes auto-detected as ['history'], destinationCountry=JP

steps.name: UpdateTrip title only (COALESCE test)
steps.details: Title changed to 'Lifecycle Test -- Kyoto Autumn'. Description preserved as 'Cherry blossom season trip for lifecycle validation'. COALESCE partial update works.

steps.name: UpdateTrip description only (COALESCE test)
steps.details: Description changed to 'Updated: autumn foliage trip.' Title preserved as 'Lifecycle Test -- Kyoto Autumn'. COALESCE partial update works.

steps.name: UpdateTrip status to ACTIVE
steps.details: Status changed to TRIP_STATUS_ACTIVE. Title and description both preserved.

steps.name: SendMessage (create itinerary)
steps.details: AI called create_itinerary_items, added 'Visit Kinkaku-ji (The Golden Pavilion)' as sightseeing on day 1. Tool result confirmed 1 item created. AI also attempted a duplicate call which was correctly rejected with 'already_exists' status.

steps.name: IngestBooking (flight)
steps.details: Flight DL7829X (Delta, JFK->BCN) ingested successfully. ListBookings returned 1 booking with correct confirmation code, provider, flight details.

steps.name: GetItinerary
steps.details: Itinerary returned 1 day with 1 item (Kinkaku-ji sightseeing)

steps.name: Share trip + verify public access
steps.details: Share token x9gYvsEe3mfDnMXoIDU7nW generated. Public GET returned correct title, description, itinerary (1 item), and booking (1 flight).

steps.name: UpdateTrip status to COMPLETED
steps.details: Status changed to TRIP_STATUS_COMPLETED. Title 'Lifecycle Test -- Kyoto Autumn' and description 'Updated: autumn foliage trip.' both preserved.

steps.name: ListTrips
steps.details: Trip present in list with status=TRIP_STATUS_COMPLETED, totalCount=1

steps.name: Unshare + verify revoked
steps.details: POST /api/trips/unshare returned ok. GET /shared/{token} returned 404 not found.

steps.name: DeleteTrip + verify cascade
steps.details: DeleteTrip returned empty success. GetTrip returned not_found (404). ListTrips returned empty (pagination.totalCount absent). Cascade verified: ListBookings empty, GetItinerary returns not_found.

ai_behavior_issues.description: During SendMessage, the AI called create_itinerary_items twice with identical arguments. The second call was correctly rejected by the backend with 'already_exists', but the AI should not have made the duplicate call. This wastes a tool loop iteration.

summary: Full lifecycle CRUD stress test passed all 14 steps with zero bugs. The complete lifecycle (create -> update title -> update description -> activate -> chat+itinerary -> ingest booking -> share -> complete -> unshare -> delete) works correctly. COALESCE partial updates preserve unmodified fields. Cascade deletion correctly cleans up bookings, itinerary, and share tokens. One minor AI behavior issue: duplicate tool call in the same turn (P2).
